items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: This is a plugin to the Obsidian software which adds a quick amendment to a user's note to their configured Jira instance for references to jira and internal info pages
items.title: srz2/obsidian-jira-linker: This is a plugin to the Obsidian software which adds a quick amendment to a user's note to their configured Jira instance for references to jira and internal info pages

items.content_html: Caret, an Obsidian Plugin
items.title: jcollingj/caret: Caret, an Obsidian Plugin
Heiss/obsidian-vikunja-plugin

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin to integrate with Zotero through ZotServer
items.title: vanakat/zotero-bridge: Obsidian plugin to integrate with Zotero through ZotServer

items.content_html: A plugin for note-taking app Obsidian™ which allows you to treat any file extension as markdown note-file
items.title: Falcion/UNITADE.md: A plugin for note-taking app Obsidian™ which allows you to treat any file extension as markdown note-file

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin to insert link to Zotero item
items.title: vanakat/zotero-link: Obsidian plugin to insert link to Zotero item

items.content_html: Small Obsidian plugin that uses Googles Gemini to genrate notes
items.title: BjarneRentz/obsidian-gemini-generator: Small Obsidian plugin that uses Googles Gemini to genrate notes

items.content_html: A plugin that allows you to define variables in your note's properties and reuse them throughout your content.
items.title: HamzaBenyazid/obsidian-live-variables: A plugin that allows you to define variables in your note's properties and reuse them throughout your content.

items.content_html: Plugin for obsidian that automatically generates virtual links for text within your notes that match with the titles or aliases of other notes in your vault.
items.title: vschroeter/obsidian-virtual-linker: Plugin for obsidian that automatically generates virtual links for text within your notes that match with the titles or aliases of other notes in your vault.

items.content_html: a plugin that combines the PARA, Periodic, Zettelkasten organiziation methods for obsidian
items.title: FahadAlothman-fsd/obsidian-brain-os: a plugin that combines the PARA, Periodic, Zettelkasten organiziation methods for obsidian

items.content_html: This Obsidian Plugin allows users to have a different file explorer experience.
items.title: ozntel/file-tree-alternative: This Obsidian Plugin allows users to have a different file explorer experience.

items.content_html: Typewriter Mode is a plugin that adds typewriter scrolling (current line stays at a fixed position on the screen), a highlight for the current line, dimming of unfocused paragraphs and more to Obsidian.
items.title: davisriedel/obsidian-typewriter-mode: Typewriter Mode is a plugin that adds typewriter scrolling (current line stays at a fixed position on the screen), a highlight for the current line, dimming of unfocused paragraphs and more to Obsidian.

items.content_html: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).
items.title: nhaouari/obsidian-textgenerator-plugin: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).

items.content_html: Obsidian-like NeoVim plugin.
items.title: IlyasYOY/obs.nvim: Obsidian-like NeoVim plugin.

items.content_html: This is an enhancing export plugin base on Pandoc for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/ ). It's allow you to export to formats like Markdown、Markdown (Hugo https://gohugo.io/ )、Html、docx、Latex etc.
items.title: mokeyish/obsidian-enhancing-export: This is an enhancing export plugin base on Pandoc for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md/ ). It's allow you to export to formats like Markdown、Markdown (Hugo https://gohugo.io/ )、Html、docx、Latex etc.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that automatically link bible verses to YouVersion bible.
items.title: jaanonim/obsidian-youversion-linker: Obsidian plugin that automatically link bible verses to YouVersion bible.

items.content_html: Obsidian Page Up|Down|Top|Bottom
items.title: chenshutian9610/obsidian-pagescroll-plugin: Obsidian Page Up|Down|Top|Bottom

items.title: iron-vault-plugin/iron-vault: Obsidian plugin for Ironsworn/Starforged games
